title: multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills
summary: 该项目提供了一个单一的 CLAUDE.md 文件，旨在改善 Claude Code 的行为。该文件基于 Andrej Karpathy 对 LLM 编码陷阱的观察，帮助开发者避免常见错误，提升代码生成质量。目前获得 195258 星，表明其高关注度和实用性。
summary_en: This project provides a single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls. It helps developers avoid common mistakes and enhance code generation quality. With 195258 stars, it shows high attention and practicality.
